title: Rhythm: punctuation flow
description: Rhythm exercise mixing all punctuation in natural sentences
text: well, today is great! she said, "i think so too." then we laughed, walked home, and slept well.
finger_focus: All learned chars — punctuation in flow
tips: Now everything you learned dances together
Don't stop at punctuation — it's part of the rhythm
Tip: enable metronome toggle for steady pace

character_tips.anna: Punctuation in flow — practice until commas don't break your rhythm.
character_tips.maxim: Pro typists treat punctuation as just more characters. Same speed.
character_tips.klavochka: Like a song with pauses, sunshine — beautiful and natural! 🎵
